lessons.name: Unit 1: Local Community
lessons.description: Learn about local community with question words + to-infinitive and phrasal verbs.

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
Community places: community center, library, park, market, temple, pagoda, workshop, craft village, pottery, weaving, embroidery

Community activities: volunteer, donate, help, support, organize, participate, contribute, preserve, maintain, develop

Adjectives: local, traditional, cultural, historical, modern, crowded, peaceful, busy, friendly, helpful

sections.heading: 2. Luyện tập từ vựng
sections.content: Practice using vocabulary in context about local community, traditional crafts, and community activities.

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
A. Question Words + to-infinitive (Từ để hỏi + to V)

Cấu trúc: Wh-word + to-infinitive

Các từ để hỏi: what, where, when, how, who, which (không dùng why)

  • what to do: làm gì
  • Ex: I don't know what to do.
  • where to go: đi đâu
  • Ex: She asked me where to go.
  • when to start: khi nào bắt đầu
  • Ex: Tell me when to start.
  • how to use: cách sử dụng
  • Ex: He showed me how to use it.
  • who to ask: hỏi ai
  • Ex: I wonder who to ask.
  • which to choose: chọn cái nào
  • Ex: I can't decide which to choose.

Vị trí: Sau động từ: know, understand, decide, wonder, ask, tell, show, learn, remember, forget

B. Phrasal Verbs (Cụm động từ)

Common phrasal verbs:

  • look after: chăm sóc
  • look for: tìm kiếm
  • look forward to: mong đợi
  • turn up: xuất hiện, đến
  • turn down: từ chối, giảm âm lượng
  • get on with: hòa thuận với
  • get over: vượt qua
  • carry out: thực hiện
  • find out: tìm ra, khám phá
  • set up: thành lập

sections.heading: 4-11. Các phần còn lại
sections.content: Getting Started, A Closer Look 1-2, Communication, Skills 1-2, Looking Back, Project

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Question Words + to-infinitive
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Xác định từ để hỏi phù hợp
  • Thêm to + V (nguyên mẫu)
  • Không dùng why

examples.question: Tell me ______ (when / start).
examples.explanation: when + to + start = khi nào bắt đầu

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: How to + V
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • how to + V = cách làm gì
  • Dùng sau: show, tell, learn, know, understand

examples.question: He showed me ______ (how / use) it.
examples.solution: He showed me how to use it.
examples.explanation: how + to + use = cách sử dụng

examples.question: Can you tell me ______ (how / get) there?
examples.solution: Can you tell me how to get there?

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Phrasal Verbs - Meaning
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Học thuộc nghĩa của phrasal verbs
  • Chọn phrasal verb phù hợp với ngữ cảnh

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Kết hợp Grammar và Phrasal Verbs
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Sử dụng cả question words + to V và phrasal verbs
  • Chú ý ngữ cảnh câu

examples.question: I don't know ______ (how / look after) plants.
examples.solution: I don't know how to look after plants.

examples.question: She asked me ______ (where / find out) information.
examples.solution: She asked me where to find out information.

examples.question: Tell me ______ (when / carry out) the plan.
examples.solution: Tell me when to carry out the plan.

exercises.question: I don't know ______ to do.
exercises.explanation: what to do = làm gì

exercises.question: She asked me ______ to go.
exercises.explanation: where to go = đi đâu

exercises.question: Tell me ______ to start.
exercises.explanation: when to start = khi nào bắt đầu

exercises.question: He showed me ______ to use it.
exercises.explanation: how to use = cách sử dụng

exercises.question: I wonder ______ to ask.
exercises.explanation: who to ask = hỏi ai

exercises.question: She ______ her younger brother.
exercises.explanation: look after = chăm sóc

exercises.question: I'm ______ my keys.
exercises.explanation: look for = tìm kiếm

exercises.question: They ______ a new business.
exercises.explanation: set up = thành lập

exercises.question: I can't decide ______ to choose.
exercises.explanation: which to choose = chọn cái nào

exercises.question: We need to ______ the truth.
exercises.explanation: find out = tìm ra, khám phá

exercises.question: Which are correct question words + to-infinitive? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Đúng: what to do, where to go, how to use. Sai: why to come (không dùng why + to V)

exercises.question: Which phrasal verbs mean 'tìm kiếm' or 'tìm ra'? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: look for = tìm kiếm; find out = tìm ra. look after = chăm sóc; carry out = thực hiện

exercises.question: Which sentences are correct? (Select all that apply)
options: Tell me why to do it.
He showed me what to buy.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: how to swim, where to go, what to buy. Sai: why to do (không dùng why + to V)

exercises.question: Fill in: I don't know ______ (what / do).
exercises.explanation: what + to + do = làm gì

exercises.question: Fill in: He showed me ______ (how / make) pottery.
exercises.explanation: how + to + make = cách làm

exercises.question: Fill in phrasal verb: She ______ (chăm sóc) her younger brother.
exercises.explanation: look after = chăm sóc

exercises.question: Fill in phrasal verb: They ______ (thành lập) a new business.
exercises.explanation: set up = thành lập

exercises.question: Rearrange: know / I / don't / what / do / to / . / asked / She / me / where / go / to / .
exercises.sample_answer: I don't know what to do. She asked me where to go.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: S + V + Wh-word + to V

exercises.question: Transform: I don't know. What should I do? → I don't know ______.
exercises.sample_answer: I don't know what to do.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: What should I do? → what to do

exercises.question: Transform: She asked me. Where should I go? → She asked me ______.
exercises.sample_answer: She asked me where to go.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: Where should I go? → where to go

exercises.question: Rearrange with phrasal verb: after / She / looks / her / brother / younger / . / for / I'm / looking / keys / my / .
exercises.sample_answer: She looks after her younger brother. I'm looking for my keys.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: look after (chăm sóc), look for (tìm kiếm)

exercises.question: Transform and combine: He showed me. How can I use it? + They set up a business. (Use question word + to V and keep the second sentence)
exercises.sample_answer: He showed me how to use it. They set up a business.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi câu 1: How can I use it? → how to use it. Giữ nguyên câu 2 với phrasal verb 'set up'
